component.name: AbraFlexi REST API Documentation
component.summary: English HTML documentation for the AbraFlexi REST API

description.p: Sphinx-generated HTML documentation for the AbraFlexi (FlexiBee) REST API, compiled and translated from the official documentation at podpora.flexibee.eu. Covers authentication, building requests, listing/filtering/queries, identifiers, writing data, validation and errors, actions and locking, batch operations and transactions, attachments, the Changes API, company management, labels/attributes/ relations, payment matching, document copying, printed reports, QR codes, and workflow.
